title: Turkish police beat us with iron rods before we lost limbs to frostbite, Afghans say
summary_full: The young migrants heading to Europe say they were stripped and had their hands tied in freezing temperatures.
summary_public: The young migrants heading to Europe say they were stripped and had their hands tied in freezing temperatures.

TR.label: negative
TR.evidence: Turkish police beat us with iron rods before we lost limbs to frostbite
